title: DefenseClaw Activity Event Payload (v7)
description: Populates the `activity` sub-object on a gateway-event-envelope when event_type="activity". Records operator-facing mutations: config save, policy reload, block/allow list update, skill approval, sink reconfiguration. Carries before/after snapshots plus a structured diff so compliance auditors can reconstruct every change without scraping CLI output.

actor.description: Principal who made the change. Format: '<subsystem>:<principal>'.

action.description: Mirrors audit.Action. Subset applicable to operator mutations.

before.description: Compact snapshot of resource before change. null on create.

after.description: Compact snapshot of resource after change. null on delete.

version_from.description: Content hash / semver of resource before change.

version_to.description: Content hash / semver of resource after change.

path.description: JSON pointer / dotted path. Array indices rendered as 'field[n]'.

before.description: Present for replace + remove. Redacted if sensitive.

after.description: Present for add + replace. Redacted if sensitive.
